legal.privacy_card_1_desc: We use industry standard encryption to protect your data.
legal.privacy_card_2_desc: Only you have access to your connected social accounts.
legal.privacy_card_3_desc: We are clear about what data we collect and why.
legal.privacy_section_1_content: Welcome to AstraPost ("we," "our," or "us"). We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you as to how we look after your personal data when you visit our website (regardless of where you visit it from) and tell you about your privacy rights and how the law protects you.
legal.privacy_section_2_content: We may collect, use, store and transfer different kinds of personal data about you which we have grouped together follows:
legal.privacy_section_2_item_1_desc: First name, last name, username or similar identifier.
legal.privacy_section_2_item_3_desc: IP address, login data, browser type, and time zone setting.
legal.privacy_section_2_item_4_desc: X (Twitter) profile info, tokens, and posted content.
legal.privacy_section_3_item_1: Where we need to perform the contract we are about to enter into or have entered into with you.
legal.privacy_section_3_item_2: Where it is necessary for our legitimate interests (or those of a third party) and your interests and fundamental rights do not override those interests.
legal.privacy_section_3_item_3: Where we need to comply with a legal or regulatory obligation.
legal.privacy_section_4_content: We have put in place appropriate security measures to prevent your personal data from being accidentally lost, used or accessed in an unauthorized way, altered or disclosed. In addition, we limit access to your personal data to those employees, agents, contractors and other third parties who have a business need to know.
legal.terms_card_1_desc: Guidelines for using our platform responsibly.
legal.terms_card_2_desc: You own your content, we just help you post it.
legal.terms_card_3_desc: Our liability and service warranties explained.
legal.terms_section_1_content: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of AstraPost's website, products, and services ("Services"). Please read these Terms carefully, and contact us if you have any questions. By accessing or using our Services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and by our Privacy Policy.
legal.terms_section_2_content: You may use our Services only if you can form a binding contract with AstraPost, and only in compliance with these Terms and all applicable local, state, national, and international laws, rules, and regulations.
legal.terms_section_3_content: You retain your rights to any content you submit, post or display on or through the Services. By submitting, posting or displaying content on or through the Services, you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license (with the right to sublicense) to use, copy, reproduce, process, adapt, modify, publish, transmit, display and distribute such content in any and all media or distribution methods (now known or later developed).
legal.terms_section_4_content: All right, title, and interest in and to the Services (excluding Content provided by users) are and will remain the exclusive property of AstraPost and its licensors. The Services are protected by copyright, trademark, and other laws of both the United States and foreign countries.
legal.terms_section_5_item_1: Access, tamper with, or use non-public areas of the Services, AstraPost's computer systems, or the technical delivery systems of AstraPost's providers.
legal.terms_section_5_item_2: Probe, scan, or test the vulnerability of any system or network or breach or circumvent any security or authentication measures.
legal.terms_section_5_item_3: Access or search or attempt to access or search the Services by any means (automated or otherwise) other than through our currently available, published interfaces that are provided by AstraPost.
legal.terms_section_5_item_4: Interfere with, or disrupt, (or attempt to do so), the access of any user, host or network, including, without limitation, sending a virus, overloading, flooding, spamming, mail-bombing the Services.
legal.terms_section_6_content: We may suspend or terminate your access to and use of the Services, at our sole discretion, at any time and without notice to you. Upon any termination, discontinuation or cancellation of Services or your Account, the following provisions will survive: ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, limitations of liability, and dispute resolution provisions.

marketing.hero_title: Supercharge Your X Presence with AI
marketing.hero_subtitle: Schedule threads, generate viral content with AI, and track your analytics. AstraPost is the all-in-one tool for serious creators.

community.hero_subtitle: Connect with thousands of creators, share your wins, get feedback on your content, and grow together.
community.benefit_challenges_desc: Participate in content challenges and win prizes.
community.benefit_feedback_desc: Get honest feedback on your threads before posting.
community.benefit_amas_desc: Chat with top creators and the AstraPost team.
community.faq_subtitle: Check the FAQ below or send us a message — we're happy to help.
community.urgent_email_prefix: For urgent issues, email us directly at
community.cta_subtitle: Get instant access to our community of creators and start growing your audience today.
community.faq_1_question: How do I join the AstraPost Discord community?
community.faq_1_answer: Click the "Join Discord" button on this page. Once inside, introduce yourself in #introductions and head to #content-feedback to start sharing your work. All plans get free community access.
community.faq_2_question: How do I get feedback on my threads before posting?
community.faq_2_answer: Share your draft in the #feedback-lounge channel on Discord. Tag it with your niche (e.g. #tech, #finance, #arabic-content) for targeted responses. Pro and Agency users also get access to dedicated review channels.
community.faq_3_question: Is there a regular challenge or contest schedule?
community.faq_3_answer: Yes — every Monday we post a weekly content challenge in #weekly-challenge. Winners are announced on Fridays and featured in our newsletter. Prizes range from plan upgrades to sponsored shoutouts.
community.faq_4_question: Who should I contact for partnership or business inquiries?
community.faq_4_answer: Use the contact form below and select "Partnership / Business" as the category. Our partnerships team reviews all submissions and responds within 2 business days.
community.faq_5_question: How often are the Creator AMAs held?
community.faq_5_answer: We host at least one AMA per month, featuring a top creator or a member of the AstraPost team. Upcoming AMAs are announced in #announcements on Discord and on our roadmap page.
community.faq_6_question: I found a bug. What's the fastest way to report it?
community.faq_6_answer: Use the contact form below and select "Bug Report". Include your browser, the page URL, and steps to reproduce. For critical issues (e.g. posts not publishing), email us directly at support@astrapost.app.
community.contact_form_desc: We typically respond within 1–2 business days.
community.contact_placeholder_message: Tell us more about your question or issue…
community.contact_success_message: We've received your message and will reply within 1–2 business days. Check your inbox for a confirmation email.
community.contact_error_too_many: Too many submissions. Please wait before trying again.
community.contact_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
community.contact_error_network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
community.contact_validation_name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters
community.contact_validation_subject_min: Subject must be at least 5 characters
community.contact_validation_message_min: Message must be at least 20 characters

blog.team_bio: We're building the best AI-powered social media management platform for content creators in the MENA region. Join thousands of creators scaling their presence with AstraPost.

changelog.title: Product Updates
changelog.subtitle: Stay up to date with the latest features and improvements.
changelog.release_1_desc: Massive AI expansion with image generation, agentic posting, and viral analytics.
changelog.release_1_item_1: AI Image Generation: Create stunning images for your posts using Flux Pro and SDXL models
changelog.release_1_item_2: Inspiration Feature: Import public tweets to use as AI writing templates
changelog.release_1_item_3: Agentic Posting: Hands-off autonomous posting based on your content strategy
changelog.release_1_item_4: Competitor Analyzer: Track and analyze up to 10 competitor accounts
changelog.release_1_item_5: Viral Analyzer: Identify high-performing content patterns with AI scoring
changelog.release_1_item_6: Content Calendar: Drag-and-drop scheduling with weekly/monthly views
changelog.release_1_item_7: URL-to-Thread Generator: Paste a URL and get a complete thread draft
changelog.release_1_item_8: Reply Generator: AI-crafted smart replies to boost engagement
changelog.release_1_item_9: Bio Optimizer: AI-powered bio suggestions based on your niche
changelog.release_1_item_10: Voice Profile: Capture your unique writing style for personalized AI content
changelog.release_2_desc: Instagram, LinkedIn, and Stripe billing integration.
changelog.release_2_item_1: Instagram Integration: Schedule and publish posts to Instagram
changelog.release_2_item_2: LinkedIn Integration: Professional network scheduling now available
changelog.release_2_item_3: Stripe Billing: Secure subscription management with Stripe
changelog.release_2_item_4: Affiliate Dashboard: Track referrals and earnings
changelog.release_2_item_5: Achievements System: Gamified badges and milestones
changelog.release_2_item_6: Team Management: Multi-user workspaces with role-based access
changelog.release_3_desc: Core AI writing tools and dashboard overhaul.
changelog.release_3_item_1: AI Writer: Thread, tweet, and threadstorm generation
changelog.release_3_item_2: Smart Scheduling: Optimal time prediction for maximum engagement
changelog.release_3_item_3: Analytics Dashboard: Post performance, follower growth, engagement rates
changelog.release_3_item_4: Queue Management: Visual queue with drag-and-drop reordering
changelog.release_3_item_5: Arabic Language Support: Full RTL interface with native Arabic AI content
changelog.release_4_desc: AstraPost opens to the public with core scheduling features.
changelog.release_4_item_1: X (Twitter) Integration: Connect and manage X accounts
changelog.release_4_item_2: Post Scheduling: Schedule tweets and threads for future publishing
changelog.release_4_item_3: Basic Analytics: View post impressions, likes, and retweets

post_failure.subject: Your post failed to publish
post_failure.body: We weren't able to publish your post. This can happen due to API rate limits, token expiration, or connectivity issues.

trial_expired.subject: Your trial has ended
trial_expired.body: Your 14-day free trial of AstraPost Pro has ended. Upgrade now to continue using advanced features like AI Writer, Analytics, and Team collaboration.
trial_expired.upgrade_description: Choose the plan that fits your needs and continue creating amazing content.

trial_ending_soon.subject: Your trial is ending soon
trial_ending_soon.body: Your AstraPost Pro trial ends in {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}. Don't lose access to AI-powered content creation and analytics.
trial_ending_soon.days_left: {count, plural, one {# day left} other {# days left}}
trial_ending_soon.without_payment: Without a payment method on file, your account will be moved to the Free plan when your trial ends.

cancel_scheduled.subject: Your subscription cancellation is confirmed
cancel_scheduled.body: Your subscription has been marked for cancellation. You will continue to have Pro access until the end of your current billing period on {date}.
cancel_scheduled.access_until_end: You'll continue to have full access to all features until that date. After that, your account will be moved to the Free plan.
cancel_scheduled.reactivate_before_end: If you change your mind, you can reactivate at any time from your account settings before the cancellation date.

reactivated.subject: Your subscription has been reactivated
reactivated.body: Great news! Your AstraPost Pro subscription has been reactivated. You continue to have full access to all Pro features.

subscription_cancelled.subject: Your subscription has been cancelled
subscription_cancelled.body: Your AstraPost Pro subscription has been cancelled. You now have access to the Free plan features. We'd love to hear your feedback.
subscription_cancelled.resubscribe_anytime: You can resubscribe at any time from your account settings.

payment_failed.subject: Payment failed for your subscription
payment_failed.body: We were unable to process your payment. Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption.
payment_failed.grace_period: Your account will remain active during the grace period, but service will be interrupted if payment is not updated.

payment_succeeded.subject: Payment confirmed — Thank you!
payment_succeeded.body: Your payment of {amount} was successful. Thank you for choosing AstraPost Pro!

team_invite.subject: You've been invited to join {teamName} on AstraPost
team_invite.body: You have been invited to join a team on AstraPost. Collaborate on content creation, scheduling, and analytics together.
